---
title: "Girls\' Friendly Society Reading Union"
---

## Girls\' Friendly Society Reading Union

**Type:** organization

### Letters Mentioning This Organization

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Decr 9th  [1898]](../letters/3388_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
